> **How merch requests work**
> By default, Lottie, Heidi & Daniel should be assigned to all merch requests and the request will be added to [the merch project board](https://github.com/orgs/PostHog/projects/178). They will decide who will work on this brief and reassign as needed. You can check the project board for updates if needed. 
>
> If your request is genuinely urgent, please share in the [#merch channel](https://posthog.slack.com/archives/C04DWKH7DM3) and mention Lottie, Heidi or Daniel.

## Outline
_Let us know what you want made, and if you have any design direction/inspiration.
_If it's for an event, let us know and include the deadline 

## Deadline & Priority
_Leave reasonable time to get things made- design roughly can take up to a week and production up to 4-6 weeks for complicated items. A week is the minimum. Two weeks notice is good, even more time is ideal._

## Additional comments
_Comments but... additional, you know?_
